title: TPI - Analisis de Desempeno Academico
description: Dashboard adaptado del TPI - Analisis de 10,000 estudiantes

targets.queryText: SELECT AVG(total_score) as value FROM estudiantes
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT AVG(total_score) as value FROM estudiantes

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(high_achiever) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 as value FROM estudiantes
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(high_achiever) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 as value FROM estudiantes

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(is_at_risk) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 as value FROM estudiantes
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(is_at_risk) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 as value FROM estudiantes

targets.queryText: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN gender='female' THEN total_score END) - AVG(CASE WHEN gender='male' THEN total_score END) as value FROM estudiantes
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN gender='female' THEN total_score END) - AVG(CASE WHEN gender='male' THEN total_score END) as value FROM estudiantes

targets.queryText: SELECT gender, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as A, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as B, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as C, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as D, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='Fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Fail FROM estudiantes WHERE gender IS NOT NULL AND grade IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT gender, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as A, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as B, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as C, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as D, SUM(CASE WHEN grade='Fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Fail FROM estudiantes WHERE gender IS NOT NULL AND grade IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gender ORDER BY gender

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN lunch=1 THEN 'Con Subsidio' ELSE 'Sin Subsidio' END as grupo, AVG(total_score) as Total, AVG(math_score) as Matematicas, AVG(reading_score) as Lectura, AVG(writing_score) as Escritura, AVG(science_score) as Ciencias FROM estudiantes WHERE lunch IS NOT NULL GROUP BY lunch ORDER BY lunch
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN lunch=1 THEN 'Con Subsidio' ELSE 'Sin Subsidio' END as grupo, AVG(total_score) as Total, AVG(math_score) as Matematicas, AVG(reading_score) as Lectura, AVG(writing_score) as Escritura, AVG(science_score) as Ciencias FROM estudiantes WHERE lunch IS NOT NULL GROUP BY lunch ORDER BY lunch

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN test_preparation_course=1 THEN 'Con Prep' ELSE 'Sin Prep' END as grupo, AVG(math_score) as Matematicas, AVG(reading_score) as Lectura, AVG(writing_score) as Escritura, AVG(science_score) as Ciencias FROM estudiantes WHERE test_preparation_course IS NOT NULL GROUP BY test_preparation_course ORDER BY test_preparation_course
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN test_preparation_course=1 THEN 'Con Prep' ELSE 'Sin Prep' END as grupo, AVG(math_score) as Matematicas, AVG(reading_score) as Lectura, AVG(writing_score) as Escritura, AVG(science_score) as Ciencias FROM estudiantes WHERE test_preparation_course IS NOT NULL GROUP BY test_preparation_course ORDER BY test_preparation_course

targets.queryText: SELECT parental_level_of_education as nivel, AVG(total_score) as promedio FROM estudiantes WHERE parental_level_of_education IS NOT NULL GROUP BY parental_level_of_education ORDER BY AVG(total_score) DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT parental_level_of_education as nivel, AVG(total_score) as promedio FROM estudiantes WHERE parental_level_of_education IS NOT NULL GROUP BY parental_level_of_education ORDER BY AVG(total_score) DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT race_ethnicity as Grupo, ROUND(AVG(total_score),1) as Promedio, ROUND(AVG(math_score),1) as Matematicas, ROUND(AVG(reading_score),1) as Lectura, ROUND(AVG(writing_score),1) as Escritura, ROUND(AVG(science_score),1) as Ciencias, ROUND(CAST(SUM(high_achiever) AS REAL)/COUNT(*)*100,1) as 'Alto %', ROUND(CAST(SUM(is_at_risk) AS REAL)/COUNT(*)*100,1) as 'Riesgo %', COUNT(*) as Cantidad FROM estudiantes WHERE race_ethnicity IS NOT NULL AND race_ethnicity != 'group C
' GROUP BY race_ethnicity ORDER BY AVG(total_score) DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT race_ethnicity as Grupo, ROUND(AVG(total_score),1) as Promedio, ROUND(AVG(math_score),1) as Matematicas, ROUND(AVG(reading_score),1) as Lectura, ROUND(AVG(writing_score),1) as Escritura, ROUND(AVG(science_score),1) as Ciencias, ROUND(CAST(SUM(high_achiever) AS REAL)/COUNT(*)*100,1) as 'Alto %', ROUND(CAST(SUM(is_at_risk) AS REAL)/COUNT(*)*100,1) as 'Riesgo %', COUNT(*) as Cantidad FROM estudiantes WHERE race_ethnicity IS NOT NULL AND race_ethnicity != 'group C
' GROUP BY race_ethnicity ORDER BY AVG(total_score) DESC
